frontmatter.title: Kimchi Jjigae in Guichi Meat Restaurant

pageProps.content:
Kimchi Jjigae(=stew) bubbling

Kimchi jjigae(=stew) is one of the popular foods in Korea. Blog link of the author of this article: seodaeya.tistory.com/
